module: Module 10 - Rearchitect or Reengineer One Concern
selected_modernization: Move non-secret runtime configuration to Azure App Configuration while keeping secrets in Azure Key Vault.

code_and_configuration_changes.description: Adds an Azure runtime profile that reads config-source, externalized-config and feature flag values from environment variables supplied by App Configuration.
Binds safe runtime configuration values with Spring Boot configuration properties.
Publishes safe runtime configuration evidence through the actuator info endpoint without exposing secrets.
Runs the container with postgres and azure profiles and injects non-secret App Configuration-backed settings.
Defines Azure App Configuration store, labels, non-secret keys, Key Vault references and managed identity reader access.

new_runtime_dependencies.control: Managed identity with App Configuration Data Reader, enforced by private endpoint or Azure Firewall application rule.

secret_handling.database_secrets: Remain in Azure Key Vault or Container Apps secrets.
secret_handling.app_configuration_values: Only non-secret flags and Key Vault reference metadata are stored in App Configuration.
